dct_description_sm: Likely appears in Neeuwe Archontologia cosmica, 1646
Date and publication information derived from donor description
Coordinates approximate and based on Greenwich meridian
Compass rose in lower center. North oriented to lower right
Shows Algiers from the perspective of the Mediterranean Sea, along with the city walls, moat, forts, and settlements. Ships are depicted in the sea and at the docks
